name: Herbed Tomato Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a 2-quart saucepan over medium heat.
2. Bring the sauce almost to boil, then reduce heat to simmer and cover.
3. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 30 minutes until flavors are blended.
4. Use immediately or uncover, allow to cool, and refrigerate in non-metallic container.
